2026-03-13FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActAppointment of the Chairperson of the Canadian International Trade TribunalAppointment of Bree Jamieson-Holloway of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Chairperson of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term ending on December 4, 2027.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Chairperson of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal
precis: Appointment of Bree Jamieson-Holloway of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Chairperson of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term ending on December 4, 2027.
